testimonials.name: Jessica L.
testimonials.text: The most comfortable dental visit I've ever had. Dr. Carter and her team made me feel completely at ease from start to finish. My veneers look stunning.

testimonials.name: Rahul M.
testimonials.text: Professional, modern, and genuinely caring. My Invisalign journey was absolutely seamless. I'm thrilled with my new smile.

testimonials.name: Amanda K.
testimonials.text: Finally a dentist my kids actually like! The pediatric team is incredible — patient, playful, and so gentle. We drive across town just to come here.

testimonials.name: James T.
testimonials.text: I was terrified of dentists for 20 years. Bright Smile changed that. They listened, they cared, and they made a root canal... comfortable. Unreal.

testimonials.name: Priya S.
testimonials.text: Transparent pricing, no pushy upsells, and genuinely excellent care. My implant looks and feels completely natural. I recommend them to everyone.

testimonials.name: Michael D.
testimonials.text: Emergency appointment at 8pm on a Saturday. They fit me in, fixed the issue, and charged less than I expected. Absolute lifesavers.

team.name: Dr. Emily Carter
team.bio: Dr. Carter is an award-winning cosmetic dentist with advanced training in smile design. She believes every patient deserves a smile they're proud to share.

team.name: Dr. Liam Brooks
team.bio: A certified Invisalign provider with a passion for transforming smiles. Dr. Brooks combines precision with a warm, approachable chairside manner.

team.name: Dr. Priya Nair
team.bio: Dr. Nair specializes in making dentistry fun and fear-free for children. Her gentle approach has earned the trust of hundreds of NYC families.

team.name: Dr. Marcus Chen
team.bio: Board-certified oral surgeon specializing in implants, extractions, and full-mouth rehabilitation. Precision and patient comfort are his trademarks.

faq.question: Do you accept my insurance?
faq.answer: We accept most major dental insurance plans including Delta Dental, Cigna, MetLife, Aetna, Guardian, BlueCross BlueShield, and more. Call us or bring your insurance card to your visit — we'll verify your benefits and provide a clear estimate before any treatment begins.

faq.question: What should I expect at my first visit?
faq.answer: Your first visit is all about comfort and clarity. You'll be greeted by our friendly team, complete a comprehensive exam with digital X-rays, and have a conversation with your doctor about your goals. We'll present treatment options with transparent pricing — no pressure, just honest guidance.

faq.question: Do you offer sedation dentistry?
faq.answer: Yes. We offer multiple sedation options including nitrous oxide (laughing gas), oral conscious sedation, and IV sedation. We'll recommend the best option based on your anxiety level and treatment complexity.

faq.question: How much does a cleaning cost without insurance?
faq.answer: A standard adult cleaning with exam starts at $199. We offer a New Patient Special that includes exam, X-rays, and cleaning for $199. We also offer CareCredit and in-house payment plans to make care accessible.

faq.question: What payment options do you offer?
faq.answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex, Discover), cash, and CareCredit financing. We also offer in-house payment plans for qualifying treatments. We'll work with you to find a comfortable option.

faq.question: Do you treat children?
faq.answer: Absolutely. Dr. Priya Nair leads our pediatric dentistry program, creating a fun, welcoming environment for children of all ages. We recommend first visits by age 1 or within 6 months of the first tooth.

faq.question: What if I have a dental emergency?
faq.answer: Call us immediately at +1 (212) 555-0199. We reserve same-day emergency slots for existing and new patients. For after-hours emergencies, follow our voicemail instructions to reach the doctor on call.

faq.question: How long does Invisalign treatment take?
faq.answer: Most Invisalign treatments range from 6 to 18 months depending on the complexity of your case. During your free consultation, Dr. Brooks will provide a personalized timeline and digital preview of your expected results.

chatbot.name: Smile Assistant
chatbot.greeting: Hi there! I'm your Bright Smile assistant. How can I help you today? You can ask about our services, pricing, insurance, or book an appointment.

responses.pricing: Our New Patient Special includes exam, X-rays, and cleaning for just $199. Cosmetic consultations are $150. Want a detailed estimate? Use our booking form or call us!

responses.insurance: We accept most major plans including Delta Dental, Cigna, MetLife, Aetna, and Guardian. Bring your card to your visit and we'll handle the rest!
responses.emergency: If you have a dental emergency, please call us immediately at +1 (212) 555-0199. We reserve same-day slots for urgent cases.
responses.default: I'm here to help! Ask me about pricing, booking, insurance, or emergency care. Or use our booking form to schedule your visit!
